title: Come Along for an Eventful Week: Roland Garros, Summer Fridays, a Skin Reset & Unboxing a New Bag
description:
Welcome back, my loves! 

This week was packed with exciting experiences, and I’m so happy to bring you along for every moment.

I attended the Roland Garros Tennis Tournament in Paris for the very first time, and it was such an incredible experience to witness the energy and  atmosphere in person. I loved every minute of it! 
I also take you with me to discover the latest Summer Fridays product launch. The adventures continue at the 500 Ferraris Against Cancer event, where I got to be driven on
